title: [INFRA] Remove ibr-web from mishal-one-web directory — 3.4GB nested repo
notes: GROUNDED: Separate git repo, own .git dir, 3.4GB. Already gitignored. Single command: rm -rf ibr-web/ or mv to ../../. No code references it. Zero risk.

title: [ARCH] Decide CMS — Payload vs Sanity — gates 10 downstream items
notes: STAKEHOLDER: Mishal decides. Docs prepared (docs/cms-evaluation.md). Key questions: (1) Do you want self-host control or zero-ops? (2) Do you need native forms or will GHL handle all lead capture? (3) Did Payload fail due to config complexity or infrastructure? If GHL handles forms+email+CRM, Sanity Free covers blog+media with zero ops. Payload only wins if you need paywalls or want to avoid $99/mo Sanity Growth for scheduling.

title: [WEB] Set up CMS with blog collection — posts CRUD + Astro fetch
notes: GROUNDED: If Sanity — npm create sanity@latest, @sanity/astro integration, GROQ queries. If Payload — npx create-payload-app -t website, REST API fetch. Both have Astro official guides. Subtasks: (1) install CMS, (2) define blog schema, (3) create Astro fetch layer, (4) migrate hello-world post, (5) verify build. First-time CMS setup +1d buffer.

title: [WEB] Set up CMS media library — uploads + CDN + Astro Picture
notes: GROUNDED: Sanity has built-in CDN + @sanity/image-url. Payload needs @payloadcms/plugin-cloud-storage + R2. Wire to Astro <Picture> with formats=['avif','webp']. Subtasks: (1) configure storage, (2) upload test image, (3) Astro helper to generate srcset, (4) migrate profile photo.

title: [WEB] Set up CMS pages collection — about, speaking, how-I-work
notes: GROUNDED: Same pattern as blog collection but simpler schema. Fields: title, slug, body, seo fields. Dynamic route [...slug].astro. Depends on BL-003 being done first (CMS operational).

title: [WEB] Set up CMS testimonials collection — quote + attribution
notes: DEV-WORK: Simple collection, ~30min schema + component. Deferred to v0.3.0 — Baker Signal 12 is lower priority than signals 3,5,8,9.

title: [OPS] Set up Go High Level account + API key + pipeline
notes: GROUNDED: GHL Starter $97/mo. Dashboard setup: create account → Settings → API → generate Bearer token → create pipeline 'Website Leads' → create tags. Store key in .env + .envrc. See docs/go-high-level-integration.md. Assumes: Mishal has credit card ready, GHL 14-day trial available.

title: [WEB] Build lead capture form component — GHL API + UTM capture
notes: GROUNDED: LeadCaptureForm.astro component. Client-side JS captures UTMs from URLSearchParams. POST to Cloudflare Function at /api/lead (functions/api/lead.ts for CF Pages). GHL contacts/upsert endpoint documented. Subtasks: (1) CF function, (2) Astro component, (3) UTM capture, (4) success/error states.

title: [OPS] Create GHL welcome email workflow — drip sequence
notes: GROUNDED: GHL dashboard no-code workflow builder. Trigger: Contact Tagged 'blog-lead'. Actions: wait → email → wait → email. Templates styled with brand hex codes. 100% GHL dashboard work, no code.

title: [OPS] Set up UTM tracking convention + attribution
notes: GROUNDED: Document naming convention (utm_source=site|newsletter|twitter|linkedin, utm_medium=organic|social|email, utm_campaign=slug). Update social links in config.ts + llms.txt. GHL constraint: form on same page as landing. Pure docs + config edits.

title: [OPS] Set up Buttondown newsletter + RSS-to-email
notes: GROUNDED: Buttondown free tier. Create account → connect RSS feed URL (mishal.one/rss.xml) → configure auto-send cadence → style email template. Subscribe form is just an email input POSTing to Buttondown's API or embed. GDPR: Buttondown handles double opt-in.

title: [WEB] Create RSS feed endpoint — @astrojs/rss
notes: GROUNDED: @astrojs/rss is official Astro package. src/pages/rss.xml.ts, import getCollection, map to rss() items. Already have auto-discovery <link> in BaseHead. Pattern documented in Astro docs. If CMS: fetch from API instead of getCollection.

title: [WEB] Add share buttons to blog posts — X, LinkedIn, copy-link
notes: GROUNDED: ShareButtons.astro. URLs: twitter.com/intent/tweet?text=TITLE&url=URL, linkedin.com/sharing/share-offsite/?url=URL, navigator.clipboard.writeText for copy. Lucide icons already installed. No dependencies needed.

title: [OPS] Set up auto-post to X on CMS publish — webhook chain
notes: GROUNDABLE: Need to verify X API v2 write access requirements (developer account tier, OAuth2 flow). GHL can trigger outbound webhook on workflow → but does GHL support X API directly? Alternative: Cloudflare Worker receives CMS webhook, calls X API. Risk: X API access costs may have changed. Deferred to v0.3.0.

title: [OPS] Set up PostHog for content analytics
notes: GROUNDED: PostHog JS snippet in BaseLayout. posthog.init() with project API key. Custom events: posthog.capture('form_submit'), etc. Free tier <1M events/mo. Dashboard built in PostHog UI. Subtasks: (1) create PostHog project, (2) add snippet to BaseLayout, (3) add custom events, (4) build dashboard.

title: [WEB] Build /brand page skeleton — 8 sections from spec
notes: DEV-WORK: 8 sections from docs/backlog.md BRAND-001. Colour palette reads from design tokens JSON at build time. Components: ColourSwatch, ColourPalette, AssetCard, UsageRule. Largest frontend item — but well-specified.

title: [WEB] Add location to footer — Baker Signal 5
notes:
GROUNDED: Add

Based in Australia

to Footer.astro. One line change. Zero risk.

title: [WEB] Make newsletter signup the primary CTA — Baker Signal 3
notes: GROUNDED: Add email input + Gold submit button to landing page hero section. POST to Buttondown API or GHL. Replace/supplement current social links as primary action. Success state: 'Check your inbox'. Depends on BL-011 (Buttondown) or BL-007 (GHL).

title: [WEB] Create About page — ICP + positioning — Baker Signals 8,9,10
notes: STAKEHOLDER: Content is a Mishal creative decision (positioning statement, ICP description, how-I-work process). Technical implementation is simple once content exists. Can start with hardcoded Astro page, migrate to CMS later.

title: [WEB] Create Speaking page — Baker Signal 4
notes: DEFERRED: Requires speaking content (topics, past appearances). Not needed for launch. Can build after first 3-5 blog posts establish positioning.

title: [OPS] Set up content scheduling — CMS + cron builds
notes: GROUNDED: GitHub Actions cron workflow: schedule every 6h, runs bun run build && bun run deploy:production. CMS publishDate field filters posts. If Sanity Growth ($99/mo): native Content Releases instead. Subtasks: (1) GH Actions workflow file, (2) CF Pages deploy hook or wrangler deploy, (3) test with future-dated post.

title: [OPS] Create batch content workflow — end-to-end automated pipeline
notes: DEV-WORK: Integration test + documentation. Create 4 real posts, stagger dates, verify full chain fires. This is the capstone that proves the system works. Depends on BL-003, BL-011, BL-012, BL-021 all being operational.

title: [WEB] Generate OG images per blog post — Satori + Sharp
notes: GROUNDABLE: Need to verify Satori works in Astro build-time context (it's a Vercel package). Alternative: use @vercel/og or astro-og-canvas. Risk: Satori may not work in bun. Deferred — default og-placeholder.png works for launch.

title: [WEB] Extend structured data — BreadcrumbList + FAQPage
notes: GROUNDED: BreadcrumbList is a simple JSON-LD array based on URL path segments. FAQPage only if content has Q&A format. Already have StructuredData.astro component. Just add to BlogLayout.

title: [ARCH] Research paywalled content approach — tiers + payment
notes: DEFERRED: Research only, no implementation. Not needed until content velocity is proven and audience exists. Revisit after 20+ published posts.

title: [WEB] Update social links — replace LinkedIn PLACEHOLDER
notes: STAKEHOLDER: Need Mishal's LinkedIn URL. Technical change is 2 lines in config.ts + llms.txt update. Blocked on: Mishal providing the URL.

title: [OPS] Remove noindex when site is ready — go live
notes: GROUNDED: Remove noindex={true} from BaseLayout default, keep on 404. Submit sitemap to Google Search Console. 5-minute change, but gate it on: BL-003 (CMS working), BL-018 (CTA ready), BL-026 (links real).

title: [OPS] Deploy to Cloudflare Pages production — mishal.one live
notes: GROUNDED: bun run deploy already configured in package.json. Wrangler project 'mishal-one-web' exists. SSL via Cloudflare. Verify: robots.txt, sitemap, llms.txt, Lighthouse >90. First-time deploy buffer: already deployed before (commit 824048e), so no new platform setup needed.

title: [SEC] Configure Cloudflare security headers — CSP, HSTS, XSS
notes: GROUNDED: Create public/_headers file with CSP, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, HSTS. Cloudflare Pages serves _headers file as custom response headers. Well-documented pattern.

title: [QA] Integration test — full content pipeline end-to-end
notes: LIFECYCLE: Sprint 2 exit criteria. Manual walkthrough: CMS create → publish → build → renders → RSS valid → Buttondown received → GHL contact exists → PostHog event visible. Document as checklist.

title: [DOCS] Document content operations runbook
notes: DEV-WORK: Write docs/content-ops-runbook.md. Covers: weekly cadence, how to create/schedule/publish, troubleshooting failed builds, newsletter bounce handling, analytics review checklist. Fits 4hrs/week operator model.

title: [OPS] Set up monitoring — health check + uptime
notes: GROUNDED: Betterstack free tier or Cloudflare analytics (already included). GH Actions failure notifications via email (default). 15-minute setup.

title: [OPS] Budget tracking — monthly cost cap and alerts
notes: GROUNDED: Simple docs/budget.md. Cloudflare $0, GHL $97, Buttondown $0-15, domain $15/yr. Set Cloudflare spending alert at $5. GHL is fixed. Total ~$112/mo. 15-minute doc.
